items.title: Bad News For Trump: Approval Rating Taking A 'Beating' Over Iran War And DHS Shutdown
items.summary: On "Forbes Newsroom," HarrisX founder and CEO Dritan Nesho discussed a new Harvard CAPS/Harris poll on President Trump’s approval rating and the war against Iran.

items.title: 3 Utility Stocks With Strong Dividends and Room to Run Higher
The 1 Stat That Proves Nvidia Remains a Screaming Buy Below $200
This Dividend Stock Is Down 8% and That Makes It One of the Best Buys of the Year
Official Trailer for Coming-of-Age Movie 'Mabel' About a Plant Lover
items.summary: "Sometimes I feel like plants are more interesting than people." "They are." 🌱 Tribeca Films has debuted a charming official trailer for the film Mabel, an indie coming-of-age creation from filmmaker Nicholas Ma making his feature directorial debut. This originally premiered back in 2024 at the San Francisco Film Fest and has been waiting to be released ever since. Now coming out in limited theaters (NY and LA to start) this month.
